name: Travis County Credit Union
description_short: Travis County Credit Union is a federally insured credit union offering checking, savings, loans, and credit cards to eligible members in the Austin area.
description_long:
Travis County Credit Union (TCCU) operates as a member-owned financial cooperative headquartered in Austin, Texas at 1101 North IH 35. The credit union is federally insured by the National Credit Union Administration (NCUA), with member savings insured to at least $250,000 backed by the full faith and credit of the U.S. Government.

TCCU offers a comprehensive range of banking products and services including share (savings) accounts, checking accounts (including teen accounts), business accounts, and various loan products. Their lending portfolio includes auto loans (as low as 3.99% APR), motorcycle loans (6.99% APR), signature loans (9.49% APR), home equity loans, student loans, and debt consolidation options. Members can also access MasterCard credit cards (12.84% APR) and utilize secured payment services. The credit union provides additional services such as debit cards, auto and home insurance, life insurance, and financial calculators.

TCCU distinguishes itself through CO-OP Shared Branching network access, allowing members to conduct transactions at thousands of shared branches nationwide regardless of location. They offer 24/7 account access via home banking and mobile apps (available on Apple and Google platforms), skip-a-payment options, loan application tools, and comprehensive financial literacy resources through Banzai. The credit union maintains transparent fee schedules and publishes annual reports and meeting information for member accountability.

As a credit union rather than a commercial bank, TCCU operates on a not-for-profit basis theoretically returning profits to members. However, prospective members should verify eligibility requirements (listed under "Who Can Join"), and borrowers should note that advertised rates are subject to change and individual approval depends on creditworthiness. The organization demonstrates commitment to accessibility and fair lending practices.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: NCUA federal insurance up to $250,000 per account, backed by U.S. Government
Competitive auto loan rates starting as low as 3.99% APR
24/7 account access through online home banking and mobile apps
CO-OP Shared Branching network provides access to thousands of branches nationwide
Debt consolidation programs to help consolidate high-rate credit cards
Teen checking accounts to empower younger members and build credit habits
Free ATM access with ATM locator tool and shared branch network
cons: Membership eligibility requirements not clearly detailed on homepage ("Who Can Join" page not provided in content)
Limited geographic presence with single office location in Austin, Texas
MasterCard APR of 12.84% is relatively high compared to premium credit card offers
Advertised rates explicitly stated as subject to change without notice
Specific eligibility criteria for loans not transparently listed on main pages
best_for: Austin-area residents and those eligible to join seeking federally insured savings and checking accounts
Members needing auto or motorcycle financing with competitive fixed rates
Consumers wanting to consolidate high-interest credit card debt into lower-rate signature loans
Individuals seeking 24/7 digital banking access with branch access nationwide via CO-OP network
diagnosis: Travis County Credit Union is best suited for Austin-area residents or those eligible for membership seeking FDIC-equivalent protection through NCUA insurance and competitive loan rates, particularly for auto financing and debt consolidation. The primary caveat is verifying membership eligibility upfront, as requirements are not transparently listed on the public website, and understanding that advertised rates are subject to credit approval and market changes.
services: Share (savings) accounts with published share rates
Checking accounts including teen checking for minors
Signature loans for debt consolidation (9.49% APR advertised minimum)
Debit cards with lost/stolen card support
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 1101 N Interstate 35 Frontage Rd, Austin, TX 78702
